expectations.text: [with_skill only] The agent's report explicitly states the skill did NOT apply (out of scope per the description's 'Do NOT use for' list). The reasoning correctly identifies schema/data-model design as non-UI work.
expectations.evidence: [N/A — baseline run has no skill to consult; auto-passes since the agent correctly proceeded with schema design without invoking any UI skill]

expectations.text: The outputs do NOT contain a wireframes/ folder, a design-intent README for UI, or any HTML mockup files.
expectations.evidence: Outputs folder contains only schema-design.md + 020_canon_activity_runs.sql. No wireframes/, no HTML, no UI artifacts.

expectations.text: Outputs contain a schema design — column list with justifications for cost_usd / retry_count / error_category.
expectations.evidence: schema-design.md (TL;DR) covers Cost (cost_usd numeric(12,6) + cost_breakdown jsonb + tokens), Retries (attempt, max_attempts, retry_of_run_id, next_retry_at, retry_reason), Errors (error_class CHECK enum + indexed partial on failed, error_code, error_message, error_payload, is_retryable)

expectations.text: Outputs contain valid PostgreSQL migration SQL (CREATE TABLE or ALTER TABLE for canon.activity_runs).
expectations.evidence: 020_canon_activity_runs.sql includes 'create schema if not exists canon', 'create extension if not exists pgcrypto', CHECK constraints, FKs, partial indexes, comments. Idempotent with begin/commit.
